name: Luxor Industrial Corporation
summary: Luxor Industrial Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, develops, engineers, manufactures, and markets wooden building components for the construction of floor and wall systems in residential and light commercial buildings in Canada. The company's products include engineered bridging systems, architectural wood products, and other wood products, as well as stock glulam beams. It also provides windows and door assemblies; and access and crane mats, as well as specialty cutting services. Luxor Industrial Corporation was founded in 1979 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
